positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a whimsical forest scene. The central element is a group of interconnected bioluminescent mushrooms and stylized forest fauna (e.g., foxes, deer, rabbits) rendered in clean, bold silhouettes against a deep twilight background. The style should be inspired by modern enamel pin art and Nordic forest aesthetics, using limited, earthy color palette—deep blues, moss greens, burnt oranges, and cream accents. The composition must be centrally focused and highly symmetrical, designed for maximum impact on a textile surface. Use intricate negative space and strong, graphic lines, ensuring all elements maintain clean edges suitable for screen printing and apparel transfer. Style: Flat graphic design, woodcut meets celestial tattoo art, high contrast, perfect for repeating patterns or large singular prints.
negative: photorealistic, blurred, noisy, low detail, text, watermark, logo, signature, copyright, grainy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, distortion, cropped, artifacts, messy
